## Audit checklist

```text
[ ] Implementation report added under docs/audit/
[ ] Risk register updated if needed
[ ] P0/P1 findings addressed or explicitly deferred
[ ] No private keys, DBs, dumps, tokens or local secrets committed
[ ] Runtime/client changes have manual verification, if applicable
[ ] APPROVED FOR MERGE received before merge
```
